comments.comment:
Chlorine is used in the bleaching of pulp. It is measured twice annually in ì
the bleach plant stack and the R8 generator vent stack.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emissions decreased in 2022 compared to 2021 values. Annual actual values are calculated based on typically two stack sampling events per year which can be highly variable based on operating conditions at the time of testing. Using such a small sample size to estimate an entire year's emissions can have an exaggerated effect on emissions estimates.
